title: calyptrostylis ceylanica
intro: Calyptrostylis ceylanica, also known as Ceylon calyptrostylis or Sri Lanka calyptrostylis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calyptrostylis ceylanica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Calyptrostylis ceylanica include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
